Date: {{ date }}

Email: {{vendor_email |default:"N/A" }}
Phone: {{vendor_contact |default:"N/A"}}
GST: {{vendor_gst |default:"N/A"}}
{% if vendor_address and vendor_address != 'N/A' %} Address:

{% endif %}
Stock Items
{% for item in items %} {% endfor %}
Product Reference Unit Price Qty Tax MFG EXP Total
{{ item.product_name }} {{ item.reference_number|default:"N/A" }} {{ item.unit }} ₹{{ item.purchase_price|floatformat:2 }} {{ item.quantity }} ₹{{ item.tax_amount|floatformat:2 }} {{ item.mfg_date|default:"N/A" }} {{ item.exp_date|default:"N/A" }} ₹{{ item.total_price|floatformat:2 }}
Subtotal: ₹{{ total|floatformat:2 }}
Total Tax: ₹{{ total_tax|floatformat:2 }}
Total: ₹{{ grand_total|floatformat:2 }}
